steps.title: Identify the problem-solution structure
steps.content: The passage explains why adaptation was difficult: the source material lacked dialogue while theater requires it. The underlined sentence immediately follows to provide the solution to this challenge.

steps.title: Match the sentence to its function
steps.content: The underlined sentence describes Yamauchi's adaptation technique—her specific method for transforming the story into a play. The other choices discuss topics not covered in the passage: the play's influence on later writers, which version is more famous, or casting details. That matches choice A — A is correct.
